case_metadata.court: Ohio First District Court of Appeals

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Courtney, who had experienced back and leg pain since 2009, testified first. He sought treatment for these conditions from Durrani beginning on October 1, 2012.
evidence_index.summary: Courtney experienced back and leg pain since 2009 and sought treatment from Durrani in 2012.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: On December 9, 2012, Durrani conducted a lumbar hemilaminectomy, foraminotomy, and L5-S1 decompression on Courtney.
evidence_index.summary: Durrani performed lumbar surgery on Courtney on December 9, 2012.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: The day after his discharge from the hospital, he awoke in excruciating pain and visited the emergency room (“ER”).
evidence_index.summary: Courtney experienced severe pain post-surgery and visited the ER.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Courtney admitted that he did not complete the recommended course of physical therapy, stopping after two visits because he perceived it to be ineffective.
evidence_index.summary: Courtney did not complete physical therapy post-surgery.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: The judgments of the trial court are affirmed for the reasons set forth in the Opinion filed this date.
evidence_index.speaker: Judge's conclusion

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: The jury found in Koelblin’s favor as to all of his claims against Durrani.
evidence_index.summary: Jury found in favor of Koelblin on all claims.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: As to Courtney, the jury found that (1) Durrani was negligent in his care and treatment because he failed to meet the required standard of care;
evidence_index.summary: Jury found Durrani negligent in Courtney's care.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Courtney was awarded $337,804.88 in compensatory damages:
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: The jury also awarded each plaintiff $750,000 in punitive damages plus
evidence_index.summary: Each plaintiff awarded $750,000 in punitive damages.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: We accordingly overrule Durrani’s assignments of error and affirm the judgments of the trial court.
evidence_index.summary: Court overruled Durrani's errors and affirmed trial court judgments.
evidence_index.speaker: Judge's conclusion

verdict_detected.key_phrase: The jury found in Koelblin’s favor as to all of his claims against Durrani.

decision_points.prompt: What post-operative care should be provided?

options.description: Provide comprehensive post-operative care including pain management and physical therapy
options.clinical_reasoning: Standard post-operative care to ensure recovery and prevent complications

options.description: Minimal post-operative care with limited follow-up
options.clinical_reasoning: Inadequate care leading to potential complications

expected_action_court.description: Comprehensive post-operative care should have been provided
expected_action_court.standard_of_care_basis: Expert evidence established comprehensive care is standard

timeline_phases.description: Patient presents with chronic back and leg pain
